mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ANIMAL_REPORT ( REPORT_ID, MEMBER_ID, ANIMAL_TYPE, LOCATION, STATUS, IMAGE_NAME, CONTENT, REPORT_DATE, PROCESS_YN, REPLY_EMAIL ) VALUES ( SEQ_ANIMAL_REPORT.NEXTVAL, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{animalType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, 'N', #{replyEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_ID AS reportId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, ANIMAL_TYPE AS animalType, LOCATION AS location, STATUS AS status, IMAGE_NAME AS imageName, CONTENT AS content, REPORT_DATE AS reportDate, PROCESS_YN AS processYn, REPLY_EMAIL AS replyEmail FROM ANIMAL_REPORT ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANIMAL_REPORT WHERE PROCESS_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_REPORT ( REPORT_ID, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_ID, REASON, CONTENT, REPORT_DATE, STATUS, REPLY_EMAIL ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER_REPORT.NEXTVAL, #{reporterId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, 'N', #{replyEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_ID AS reportId, REPORTER_ID AS reporterId, TARGET_ID AS targetId, REASON AS reason, CONTENT AS content, REPORT_DATE AS reportDate, STATUS AS status, REPLY_EMAIL AS replyEmail FROM MEMBER_REPORT ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_REPORT WHERE STATUS = 'N'
